moduleTitle: Identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities
questionText: Does your organization have a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental dependencies and/or impacts?
questionKo: 귀사의 환경에 대한 의존성 및 / 또는 임팩트 ( impacts) 를 식별 , 평가 및 관리하는 프로세스가 있습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Biodiversity - Mines, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Dependencies and impacts on the environment can result in changes to the capacity of nature to provide social and economic functions. Additionally, it is essential to identify, assess, and manage dependencies and impacts on the environment in order to assess effectively the risks and opportunities of an organization. This question allows data users to gauge the organization's awareness of its own environmental dependencies and impacts.

options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

columns.text: Explain why you do not evaluate dependencies and/or impacts and describe any plans to do so in the future
columns.textKo: 의존성 및/또는 임팩트를 평가하지 않는 이유와 향후 계획을 설명하십시오

guidance.text:
General 
Note that this question asks if you have a process to identify, assess and manage 
dependencies and/or impacts . You will be asked about 
risks and opportunities in the following question.
Process in place (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has any process in place for identifying, assessing, and managing dependencies and/or impacts. Select "Yes" regardless of whether both dependencies and impacts are assessed, and regardless of whether the process is integrated (i.e. across multiple environmental issues, and any other issues) or separated. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on your assessment process in 2.2.2.
Only select "No…" if you do not have any form of process for identifying, assessing, and managing dependencies and/or impacts.
Explain why you do not evaluate dependencies and/or impacts and describe any plans to do so in the future (column 5) 
This column only appears if you select any "No" option in column 1 "Process in place" OR if you select any option except "Both dependencies and impacts" in column 2 "Dependencies and/or impacts evaluated in this process".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 4 "Primary reason for not evaluating dependencies and/or impacts".
Describe any plans to evaluate environmental dependencies and/or impacts in the future, such as initial measures taken to put an evaluation process in place.
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 4 "Primary reason for not evaluating dependencies and/or impacts", explain the criteria used to decide that evaluating dependencies and/or impacts is not important or relevant to your organization.
Note for Financial Services companies 
This question is asking about the processes used to identify, assess, and respond to environmental dependencies and/or impacts within your direct operations and upstream value chain. Please do not report the identification, assessment and management of environmental dependencies and/or impacts in your portfolio here. You will be able to do this in 2.2.4.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Note that this 문항 asks 만약 you have a 프로세스 to identify, assess 및 manage dependencies 및/또는 impacts . You will be asked about 리스크 및 기회 in the following 문항. 프로세스 in place (열 1) Select "예" 만약 귀사 has 하나 이상 프로세스 in place for 식별, 평가 및 관리 dependencies 및/또는 impacts. Select "예" regardless of whether both dependencies 및 impacts are assessed, 및 regardless of whether the 프로세스 is integrated (i.e. across multiple environmental issues, 및 하나 이상 other issues) 또는 separated. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on your assessment 프로세스 in 2.2.2. Only select "No…" 만약 you do not have 하나 이상 form of 프로세스 for 식별, 평가 및 관리 dependencies 및/또는 impacts. 그 이유를 설명 you do not evaluate dependencies 및/또는 impacts 및 설명 하나 이상 plans to do so in the future (열 5) This 열 only appears 만약 you select 하나 이상 "No" option in 열 1 "프로세스 in place" 또는 만약 you select 하나 이상 option except "Both dependencies 및 impacts" in 열 2 "Dependencies 및/또는 impacts evaluated in this 프로세스". 설명 the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 4 "주된 이유 for not evaluating dependencies 및/또는 impacts". 설명 하나 이상 plans to evaluate 환경 의존성 및/또는 임팩트 in the future, such as initial measures taken to put an evaluation 프로세스 in place. 만약 you 선택 "Judged to be unimportant 또는 not relevant" in 열 4 "주된 이유 for not evaluating dependencies 및/또는 impacts", explain the criteria used to decide that evaluating dependencies 및/또는 impacts is not important 또는 relevant to 귀사. Note for Financial Services companies This 문항 is asking about the 프로세스es used to identify, assess, 및 respond to 환경 의존성 및/또는 임팩트 within your 직접 운영사업장 및 업스트림 가치사슬. Please do not report the identification, assessment 및 management of 환경 의존성 및/또는 임팩트 in your 포트폴리오 here. You will be able to do this in 2.2.4.

guidance.text: The organization has a robust process to identify, assess, and manage environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities across its direct operations, value chain, financed activities, and assets.
guidance.textKo: The organization has a robust 프로세스 to identify, assess, 및 manage 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회 across its 직접 운영사업장, 가치사슬, financed activities, 및 assets.

guidance.text:
Manage: the approach adopted by an organization to address and respond, which includes but is not limited to prioritizing and monitoring.
Dependencies (on the environment): aspects of environmental assets and ecosystem services that an organization relies on to function ( TNFD, 2023 ).
Impacts (on the environment): changes in the condition of nature (quality or quantity), which may result in changes to the capacity of nature to provide social and economic functions (adapted from TNFD, 2023 ).
guidance.textKo: Manage: the approach adopted by an organization to address 및 respond, which includes but is not limited to prioritizing 및 monitoring. Dependencies (on the environment): aspects of environmental assets 및 ecosystem services that an organization relies on to function ( TNFD, 2023 ). Impacts (on the environment): changes in the condition of nature (quality 또는 quantity), which may result in changes to the capacity of nature to provide social 및 economic functions (adapted from TNFD, 2023 ).

moduleTitleKo: 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회의 식별, 평가 및 관리
issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, Climate Change, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, Biodiversity - Mines, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Dependencies 및 impacts on the environment can result in changes to the capacity of nature to provide social 및 economic functions. Additionally, it is essential to identify, assess, 및 manage dependencies 및 impacts on the environment in order to assess effectively the 리스크 및 기회 of an organization. This 문항 allows 데이터 사용자 to gauge the 조직의 awareness of its own 환경 의존성 및 impacts.
